Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Packaging a Gleam app into a single executable 51 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. First-ever in-utero stem cell therapy for fetal spina bifida repair is safe 164 upvotes, 16 comments
  3. Felix "fx" Lindner has died 98 upvotes, 22 comments
  4. Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS Foundation 1738 upvotes, 612 comments
  5. Inside the M4 Apple Neural Engine, Part 1: Reverse Engineering 175 upvotes, 53 comments
  6. AMD Am386 released March 2, 1991 78 upvotes, 20 comments
  7. An Interesting Find: STM32 RDP1 Decryptor 68 upvotes, 18 comments
  8. "That Shape Had None" – A Horror of Substrate Independence (Short Fiction) 17 upvotes, 2 comments
  9. Microsoft bans the word "Microslop" on its Discord, then locks the server 861 upvotes, 359 comments
  10. Use the Mikado Method to do safe changes in a complex codebase 116 upvotes, 46 comments
  11. Making Video Games in 2025 (without an engine) 355 upvotes, 165 comments
  12. Notes on Lagrange Interpolating Polynomials 29 upvotes, 8 comments
  13. Anthropic Cowork feature creates 10GB VM bundle on macOS without warning 325 upvotes, 164 comments
  14. /e/OS is a complete, fully “deGoogled” mobile ecosystem 582 upvotes, 327 comments
  15. Language Model Contains Personality Subnetworks 24 upvotes, 8 comments
  16. Mondrian Entered the Public Domain. The Estate Disagrees 181 upvotes, 109 comments
  17. Build your own Command Line with ANSI escape codes (2016) 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  18. Launch HN: OctaPulse (YC W26) – Robotics and computer vision for fish farming 34 upvotes, 15 comments
  19. Parallel coding agents with tmux and Markdown specs 75 upvotes, 45 comments
  20. Show HN: Govbase – Follow a bill from source text to news bias to social posts 65 upvotes, 38 comments
  21. 19th century silent film that first captured a robot attack 13 upvotes, 4 comments
  22. Zclaw – The 888 KiB Assistant 50 upvotes, 30 comments
  23. Bars close and hundreds lose jobs as US firm buys Brewdog in £33M deal 65 upvotes, 43 comments
  24. How to talk to anyone and why you should 440 upvotes, 466 comments
  25. A plastic made from milk that vanishes in 13 weeks 77 upvotes, 72 comments
  26. Show HN: Gapless.js – gapless web audio playback 9 upvotes, 4 comments
  27. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (March 2026) 106 upvotes, 133 comments
  28. A case for Go as the best language for AI agents 63 upvotes, 81 comments
  29. New iPad Air, powered by M4 201 upvotes, 326 comments
  30. Reflex (YC W23) Is Hiring Software Engineers – Python 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 4:00am, 3 March 2026. Source here.
